Webinar: Cervical Cancer Awareness, Diagnosis, and Treatment

Date: 14/11/2024   Platform: Zoom meeting

Join us for an insightful webinar on cervical cancer, one of the most preventable yet impactful cancers affecting women worldwide. This event is designed for healthcare professionals, students, and anyone keen on deepening their understanding of cervical cancer prevention, diagnosis, and treatment options.

What You Will Learn

In this session, we will cover the key aspects of cervical cancer, providing a comprehensive overview that includes prevention strategies, early detection techniques, and the latest treatment approaches. You'll gain a deeper understanding of how to assess risk factors, interpret diagnostic results, and develop a holistic treatment plan that focuses on patient well-being and recovery.

Webinar Content

  1. Prevention: We will discuss crucial preventive measures, including the importance of regular screening and the role of the HPV vaccine. Participants will learn about lifestyle factors, health education, and awareness programs that can significantly reduce cervical cancer risks.
  2. Diagnosis: This segment will cover screening methods such as Pap smears, HPV testing, and colposcopy. Our experts will guide you through interpreting results, understanding the different stages of cervical cancer, and the importance of early diagnosis in improving treatment outcomes.
  3. Treatment: We'll explore treatment options based on cancer stages, including surgery, radiation therapy, and chemotherapy. You'll also learn about emerging therapies and supportive care approaches, including patient counseling and management of side effects, that aim to improve quality of life during and after treatment.

Our Speakers

Dr. Renuka Gupta - Gynaecologist

Join us for an insightful webinar on cervical cancer, one of the most preventable yet impactful cancers affecting women worldwide. This event is designed for healthcare professionals, students, and anyone keen on deepening their understanding of cervical cancer prevention, diagnosis, and treatment options.

What You Will Learn

In this session, we will cover the key aspects of cervical cancer, providing a comprehensive overview that includes prevention strategies, early detection techniques, and the latest treatment approaches. You’ll gain a deeper understanding of how to assess risk factors, interpret diagnostic results, and develop a holistic treatment plan that focuses on patient well-being and recovery.

Webinar Content

Prevention

We will discuss crucial preventive measures, including the importance of regular screening and the role of the HPV vaccine. Participants will learn about lifestyle factors, health education, and awareness programs that can significantly reduce cervical cancer risks.

Diagnosis

This segment will cover screening methods such as Pap smears, HPV testing, and colposcopy. Our experts will guide you through interpreting results, understanding the different stages of cervical cancer, and the importance of early diagnosis in improving treatment outcomes.

Treatment

We’ll explore treatment options based on cancer stages, including surgery, radiation therapy, and chemotherapy. You’ll also learn about emerging therapies and supportive care approaches, including patient counseling and management of side effects, that aim to improve quality of life during and after treatment.
